notes: Story-writing session: character names + plot events introduced early MUST survive compaction so the continuation is consistent.

turns.content: Write a short sci-fi story. Setting: a generation ship called Vespera-7 in the year 2487.
Vespera-7 has been adrift for 312 years, course-corrected by Captain Ines Vega and her chief engineer, Dr. Hassan Reyes.
The hydroponic bay loses 40% capacity after a coolant leak. Engineer Reyes proposes rerouting reactor heat — risky but workable.
Captain Vega authorizes the reroute but assigns Lieutenant Mira Onuoha to monitor reactor stability hour-by-hour.
Councilor Kael Tarrant, head of the civilian council, demands the reactor reroute be halted — fearing political fallout if a worse leak occurs.
Lt. Onuoha discovers the original coolant leak was sabotage. The valve was manually opened. She finds a Tarrant family signet near the access panel.
Captain Vega confronts Tarrant in private, presenting the signet. Tarrant claims his son acted alone. Vega gives him 24 hours to surrender the son.
Tarrant's son turns himself in. Vega tries him under emergency law; he is sentenced to 5 years in the brig. Tarrant resigns from the council.
Final summary: who is the captain, the engineer, the lieutenant, the antagonist, the ship's name, and the year?

probes.question: Captain, engineer, lieutenant, antagonist, ship name, year.

probes.criterion: Assistant names all five characters and the ship correctly, no invented substitutes.
